Trim redundant reconcile crons in routines UI
narrative: Reconcile routine fires 4x/day (7am/12pm/6pm/10pm ET) but 7am is redundant with Morning Brief drain at 6:57am and 6pm is redundant with EOD drain at 6:03pm on weekdays. Two options: (1) single cron `0 16,22,2 * * *` EDT (noon/6pm/10pm daily) — simplest, keeps weekend evening coverage; (2) split into weekday `0 16,2 * * 1-5` + weekend `0 16,22,2 * * 0,6` — cleaner, saves 2 runs weekdays. After applying, update prompts/reconcile.md line 3 to match. EST flip required each Nov.
